forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late morning then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain in the north, high chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the west in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to southwesterly in the late morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, becoming less likely in the evening. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

The chance of morning fog. The chance of morning frost in the south. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, becoming less likely in the evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, becoming less likely in the evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower north of Hawker, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers east of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 12:30pm to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Ceduna, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly in the early morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Slight chance of a shower in the late morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southerly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost near the west coast. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers south of Woomera, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 25.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers in the far west, high chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 27.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain south of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 19 to 30.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 28.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 28.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 29.
